wordplay_note: The ruler of a home that no longer exists
card_description: Major Hendricks (meaning "Hendricks = home ruler") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Second Variety*. Military officer who discovers autonomous weapons have evolved beyond human control. Name note: The ruler of a home that no longer exists. Technology surpassing its creators — the robots now design themselves. First appears in *Second Variety*.

reference.brief: Military officer who discovers autonomous weapons have evolved beyond human control
reference.significance: Technology surpassing its creators — the robots now design themselves
